channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Uasin Gishu MCA Malel's Daughter Graduates from UK University, Parents Attend Ceremony
item.description: Deputy Speaker of Uasin Gishu County Assembly Sarah Malel celebrated her daughter Brenda Bii's graduation from a UK university on 16 July 2026. Both parents traveled to the UK to attend the ceremony, ...

item.title: Tanzania commits to electrifying all 64,359 subdivisions by 2030
item.description: The Tanzanian government has reaffirmed its commitment to connecting all 64,359 subdivisions across the country to electricity by 2030, aiming to expand energy access in rural areas and drive economic...

item.title: WHO updates dementia prevention guidelines, adding air pollution as a key modifiable risk factor
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has released updated global guidelines on dementia prevention, highlighting that as many as 45% of dementia cases could potentially be prevented or delayed by addre...

item.title: Kaizer Chiefs and Orlando Pirates Continue Pre-Season Preparations in Spain
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs and Orlando Pirates are continuing their pre-season preparations in Spain, with both teams securing 1-1 draws against Spanish and Saudi Arabian clubs. The matches, part of their European...

item.title: Trump's Claims About China's Election Interference Contradicted by Documents
item.description: President Donald Trump accused China of stealing 220 million voter files during the 2020 election cycle, framing it as 'sinister election meddling' in a White House speech. However, documents released...

item.title: Australian Wagyu brand expands into Philippine premium beef market
item.description: The Australian Wagyu brand is strategically positioning itself to capitalize on the increasing demand for high-quality beef in the Philippines. With a focus on premium cuts and sustainable farming pra...

item.title: Nigeria's petrol price challenges amid global tensions and rising costs
item.description: The article discusses how geopolitical tensions between the US and Iran, along with rising global oil prices, are driving up petrol costs in Nigeria. Despite a drop in crude oil prices to near pre-war...

item.title: UK Heatwave Enters Second Week With Record Temperatures
item.description: The UK is experiencing an extended heatwave, with southern regions recording temperatures above 30°C for over 12 consecutive days. This marks the longest such spell since 2006 and has led to concerns ...

item.title: UDA MPs urge Ol Kalou residents to return gas cylinders following by-election loss
item.description: A United Democratic Alliance (UDA) legislator has criticized voters in the Ol Kalou constituency for rejecting the party's candidate during a by-election. Gatundu North MP Elijah Njoroge Kururia accus...

item.title: News Corp's Social Media Platforms Republish Far-Right Activists' Video
item.description: The article details how News Corp's social media accounts, including the Daily Telegraph's Instagram and TikTok pages, republished a video of far-right anti-Islamic activist Tommy Robinson walking thr...

item.title: Court delays ex-Benue governor's N3.1 billion fraud trial for final arguments
item.description: The court has adjourned the final arguments in the N3.1 billion fraud trial of former Benue governor Samuel Suswam. The case, which has been ongoing since 2015, involves allegations that Suswam and hi...

item.title: Political Debate Over Epstein Files and Trump's Legal Involvement
item.description: Two political commentators, Brian Tyler Cohen and Jason Rantz, engaged in a heated argument during a late-night panel discussion regarding the Epstein files and their implications for former President...

item.title: SpaceX Starship Test Flight Aborted Due to Engine Failure
item.description: The article discusses the aborted test flight of SpaceX's Starship rocket, which was intended to be its 13th mission. The launch, scheduled for July 16, 2026, was called off moments before liftoff due...

item.title: JKCI's Digital System Enhances Healthcare Follow-Up in Tanzania
item.description: The Jakaya Kikwete Cardiac Institute (JKCI) has introduced a digital patient tracking system that is revolutionizing healthcare follow-up in Tanzania. Minister Paul Makonda praised the system for impr...

item.title: Trump's speech reiterates baseless 2020 election claims amid midterm concerns
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump delivered a prime-time address on Thursday, reigniting unsubstantiated allegations that the 2020 election was stolen and expressing skepticism about the security of upcomin...

item.title: Honoring Don Mattera's Legacy on Mandela Day
item.description: The Apartheid Museum, in partnership with the Don Mattera Legacy Foundation, will unveil the Don Mattera Obituary Installation on July 18 to commemorate the fourth anniversary of the late anti-aparthe...

item.title: Love story of teacher and airman on disputed Pag-asa Island
item.description: A public school teacher and a Philippine Air Force airman have found love while stationed on Pag-asa Island, a strategically significant territory in the South China Sea. Lucky Gaea Marie Bolante, a t...

item.title: ASX declines amid mining sector weakness as Coles rises post-Greencross exit
item.description: Australian shares opened lower on Friday, pressured by miners and rising energy prices. The S&P/ASX 200 Index fell 0.3% to 8816.40, with materials and financials sectors leading the decline. Gold mine...

item.title: Wildfire Challenges and Evacuations in Boston Bar, B.C.
item.description: Wildfires near Boston Bar in British Columbia are facing heightened challenges due to erratic winds and the threat of dry lightning, according to the B.C. Wildfire Service. Environment Canada reports ...

item.title: Mugithi Singer Samidoh Celebrates DCP Victory in Ol Kalou By-Election
item.description: Mugithi singer Samidoh celebrated Democratic Change Party (DCP) candidate Kamau Waweru's win in the Ol Kalou by-election, sharing memes and political jabs against the ruling UDA party. His posts inclu...
